title: Ubiquiti NanoStation 5AC Loco, Loco5AC-5, Loco5AC, 5-pack
description: The NanoStation AC and NanoStation AC loco represent the next evolution of the iconic CPE design that revolutionized the Wireless ISP industry. NanoStation 5AC Loco is a very small, 13dBi airMAX ac outdoor CPE unit, with high speed throughput
